personas.name: Casey
personas.description: Casual club player — steady, but misses tactics.

personas.name: Diego
personas.description: Attacking club player — hunts your king, soft on defense.

personas.name: Robin
personas.description: Beginner — drifts and leaks small mistakes.

personas.name: Morgan
personas.description: Improving — punishes loose play and hangs onto material.

personas.name: Alex
personas.description: Strong club player — sharp, presses for the attack.

personas.name: Vera
personas.description: Expert — grinds small edges in long games.
